title: BEM-840 find Claude protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 00:00 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
def scan_files():
    roots=[Path('governance/audit_mailbox'),Path('governance/protocols'),Path('governance/reports'),Path('governance/handoff'),Path('governance/state')]
    out=[]
    for root in roots:
        if not root.exists():
            continue
        for p in sorted(root.rglob('*')):
            if p.is_file() and p.suffix.lower() in ['.md','.txt','.json']:
                txt=read(p)
                low=(str(p)+' '+txt).lower()
                score=0
                reasons=[]
                for term in ['claude','internal auditor','клод','multi-agent','мультиагент','protocol','протокол','agreement','согласован','decision','approved','change_required','blocked','bem-','bem']:
                    if term in low:
                        score+=1
                        reasons.append(term)
                if score>=3:
                    out.append({'path':str(p),'score':score,'reasons':reasons[:12],'preview':txt[:1600]})
    return out
candidates=scan_files()
# Broad response detection: don't require exact 'CLAUDE RESPONSE' marker.
responses=[]
protocols=[]
for item in candidates:
    p=item['path']; txt=item['preview']; low=(p+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
    is_blocker='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
    is_response=(('claude' in low or 'клод' in low or 'internal auditor' in low) and ('decision' in low or 'решение' in low or 'approved' in low or 'change_required' in low or 'blocked' in low or 'approve' in low))
    is_protocol=(('protocol' in low or 'протокол' in low or 'agreement' in low or 'согласован' in low) and ('multi-agent' in low or 'мультиагент' in low or 'architecture' in low or 'архитект' in low or 'claude' in low or 'клод' in low))
    if is_response and not is_blocker:
        responses.append(item)
    if is_protocol:
        protocols.append(item)
status='existing_response_and_protocol_found' if responses and protocols else ('existing_response_found_protocol_missing' if responses else ('existing_protocol_found_response_missing' if protocols else 'existing_response_protocol_not_found'))
next_action='patch validator to accept found files and process protocol' if responses and protocols else 'continue search/repair; current broad scan did not find both artifacts'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'protocols_found':len(protocols),'responses':responses[:20],'protocols':protocols[:20],'all_candidates_count':len(candidates),'all_candidates_tail':candidates[-20:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_find_existing_claude_protocol.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_find_existing_claude_protocol.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Find Existing Claude Response And Protocol | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Responses found: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Protocols found: '+str(len(protocols))+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem840_find_existing_claude_protocol','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'protocols_found':len(protocols),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_find_existing_claude_protocol.json','governance/reports/bem840_find_existing_claude_protocol.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Broad-scanned repository for existing Claude responses and agreed protocol files, without requiring the old narrow CLAUDE RESPONSE marker')
"""
No issue comments.
